name: Moroccan Preserved Lemon Quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the lemons lengthwise and place them in a noncorrosive, airtight container.
2. Freeze for 8 hours.
3. Add 1 tablespoon of kosher salt per lemon (4 quarters).
4. Store the container at room temperature for 6 days, shaking occasionally.
The preserved lemons can be stored in the refrigerator up to 6 months. The color may darken over time. Each whole lemon yields 4 pieces.
